markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new SEO strategy, forecast, and key initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The focus shifts from high-volume new content to refreshing existing articles, a strategy proven highly effective for both traditional SEO and new AI Answer Engines (AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**New Forecast:** The previous forecast was too aggressive. The new target is 15k clicks/month by February, a 2x increase from the current \~7.5k.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)
  - [**Webinar Experiment:** A new experiment will repurpose Abnormal's 15–20+ quarterly webinars into SEO-optimized articles, owned by Abdallah's team.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [**Critical Blocker:** A GA4 tracking issue on \~100 pages (including 92 GrowthX articles) prevents accurate performance analysis and must be fixed by Abnormal's web team.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Forecast Reset

  - [**Current Performance:** Clicks are growing 90% since August, with editorial content showing strong acceleration (nearly 3x growth).](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [**Forecast Reset Rationale:** The original forecast was overly aggressive, especially its reliance on the glossary. A more realistic forecast is needed to provide a useful benchmark for measuring success.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**New Forecast:** The new target is 15k clicks/month by February, a 2x increase from the current \~7.5k. Abdallah confirmed this aligns with his internal goals.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)

### New Strategy: Content Refreshes

  - [**Core Strategy:** Shift focus to refreshing existing content, which is a proven tactic for driving SEO growth and is now favored by AI Answer Engines (AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Low Hanging Fruit):** Refresh GrowthX-written articles in positions 11–20 to push them onto page one.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Full Rebuild):** Re-evaluate underperforming content to fix intent mismatches, not just refresh the same approach.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [**Abnormal's Input:**](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Visuals:** Add diagrams and graphics to improve UX and rank in image search.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Approval:** Abdallah approved the refresh strategy, starting with GrowthX-owned content to simplify the approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

### New Experiment: Webinar Repurposing

  - [**Opportunity:** Repurpose Abnormal's high volume of webinars (15–20+ per quarter) into SEO-optimized articles.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [**Ownership:** Abdallah's team will own the experiment, providing videos and transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [**Execution:** Create 1–3 articles per webinar, linking back to the original video.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [**Distribution:** Use the new articles as more engaging success pages in post-webinar nurture streams.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)

### Reddit Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build a consistent, educational presence on Reddit.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2348.0)
  - [**Current Status:** GrowthX uses Reddit monitoring (via Gummy Search) to inform its editorial roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
  - [**Decision:** GrowthX will provide weekly Reddit monitoring reports to Abnormal. Abnormal will then use this data to inform its own internal Reddit content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)

### Critical Blocker: GA4 Tracking Issue

  - [**Problem:** \~100 pages (including 92 GrowthX articles) are not being tracked by GA4, preventing accurate performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
  - [**Cause:** Suspected GTM rule error.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=3027.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Abnormal's web team will investigate and fix the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=3045.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)
      - [Update the Airtable roadmap to reflect the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)
      - [Begin refreshing GrowthX-owned content.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=3067.0)
      - [Provide weekly Reddit monitoring reports to Abnormal.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)
  - [**Abnormal:**](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)
      - [Investigate and fix the GA4 tracking issue.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
      - [Launch the webinar repurposing experiment with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/7dbh6sZRrnsSLUY4kxccaN1A6zMy8zYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
